data.title: Bitcoin Magazine CEO Predicts No Further Bitcoin Bear Markets
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, David Bailey, CEO of Bitcoin Magazine, shared on social media that he anticipates no further bear markets for Bitcoin in the coming years. Bailey expressed confidence that sovereign nations, banks, insurance companies, corporations, and pension funds will eventually hold Bitcoin. He noted that this process has already begun, despite Bitcoin currently representing less than 0. 01% of the total market size
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/28753430730690?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Bitcoin's Future Bull Market Predicted by Industry Leader
data.description: According to BlockBeats, David Bailey, CEO of Bitcoin Magazine, shared on social media that he anticipates no further bear markets for Bitcoin in the coming years. Bailey expressed confidence that sovereign nations, banks, insurance companies, corporations, and pension funds will eventually hold Bitcoin. He noted that this process has already begun, despite Bitcoin currently representing less than 0.01% of the total market size. Bailey believes that Bitcoin's price will continue to rise.

data.title: Why emerging markets will beat developed economies in 2025
data.description:
Fund managers say developing-nation assets are poised to outpace those in richer markets in the coming months, ending a spell when both moved together after US President Donald Trump began his tariff drive in April. They base that call on the prospect of easier Federal Reserve policy, investors rotating away from US holdings, stricter budgeting […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/why-emerging-markets-will-beat-developed-economies-in-2025/

data.title: DEXs Race to Capture Perps Market Share as Traders Move Onchain
data.description:

But while decentralized exchanges have successfully captured a significant slice of spot volume from CEXs, futures trading has been slower to […]

data.title: ABCDE Co-Founder: Chinese Institutions Rapidly Adopting 'Strategy Model' in Cryptocurrency Investments
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Du Jun, co-founder of ABCDE, shared on social media that Chinese institutions are quickly adopting the 'Strategy model' in cryptocurrency investments, despite initially lagging behind. Du Jun revealed that he has been invited to participate in three Ethereum (ETH) and two Solana (SOL) 'Strategy model' initiatives currently underway, and one of the Ethereum strategies is starting with a scale of 300,000 ETH.

data.title: Cardano Climbs 10% as Volume Surges, Cup-and-Handle Pattern Targets $1 Breakout
data.description:
Cardano, a popular cryptocurrency, has experienced a significant rise of 10% recently, driven by a notable surge in trading volume. This upward movement has formed a technical pattern known as the cup-and-handle, which analysts often associate with bullish trends. As a result of this pattern, many investors are now targeting a breakout above the $1 mark, which could indicate further price appreciation and increased market interest in Cardano.
source: https://blocknews.com/cardano-climbs-10-as-volume-surges-cup-and-handle-pattern-targets-1-breakout/
